title: GateDecision
description: Quality gate decision artifact for release readiness. Produced by evaluate_gates workflow step.

feature_id.description: Reference to the feature_spec feature_id being evaluated.

status.description: Gate decision: go (release ready), conditional_go (with conditions), no_go (blocked).

profile.description: Quality profile applied: strict (high coverage), standard (balanced), lean (minimal).

reasons.description: Reasons supporting the gate decision. Must be specific and actionable.

blocking_risks.description: Risk IDs that block release if status is no_go.

waivers.description: Accepted waivers for conditional_go status with justification.

residual_risks.description: Risks remaining at release, accepted with monitoring plan.

required_follow_up.description: Follow-up actions required after release, e.g., 'monitor error rate for 2 weeks'.
